chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 183 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 21.01.2026 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter to some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Additional P.G. does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, present bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of one month hereof. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
